### 🚨 Hotfix Description
What critical issue or crash does this PR address? (e.g. startup NameError, audio exception).

### 👣 Reproduction Steps
How was this crash reproduced?

### 🛠️ Fix Applied
What changes did you implement to fix this crash?

### 🧪 Verification
- [ ] PyInstaller Core compiled
- [ ] Unit tests passed
- [ ] Application started without console window issues
